case_title: TIMOTHY C. SNOW VS. EOS RESTAURANT INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SNOW, TIMOTHY C.
